purpose: Quarantine records with non-structural regime labels from ML/training use.
upstream_root_cause: UNKNOWN — the code path that wrote a non-structural label to the regime field of these records was not traced in this session.

records.issue: regime field contains FEAR_ELEVATED which is a session_character label, not a structural regime label. Structural labels are: CAPITULATION, TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RELIEF_RALLY, RANGE_BOUND, BEAR_TRENDING, UNKNOWN.
regime field contains FEAR_ELEVATED which is a session_character label, not a structural regime label.

action: Exclude these two records from any ML training or Alphalens analysis that uses the regime field as a feature dimension until the upstream root cause is identified and fixed.
remediation: A structural regime allowlist (_STRUCTURAL_REGIME_LABELS) was added to orders_core._resolve_regime() to prevent future non-structural labels from being accepted. This is a defensive guard — the root cause is not yet confirmed.
